typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	ETLStaffKey as integer ()
}

source(output(
		OfficeGroupID as integer,
		OfficeGroup as string,
		PartnerID as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	format: 'table',
	staged:false) ~> OfficeGroupSource	source(output(
		OfficeID as integer,
		OfficeName as string,
		Hide as boolean,
		TimeStampField as string,
		OfficeGroupID as integer,
		Phone as string,
		Address1 as string,
		Address2 as string,
		Address3 as string,
		Address4 as string,
		KBA_Phone as string,
		KBA_Address1 as string,
		KBA_Address2 as string,
		KBA_Address3 as string,
		KBA_Address4 as string,
		RFG_Phone as string,
		RFG_Address1 as string,
		RFG_Address2 as string,
		RFG_Address3 as string,
		RFG_Address4 as string,
		RPS_Phone as string,
		NavOfficeCode as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	format: 'table',
	staged:false) ~> OfficeSource
OfficeGroupSource sort(asc(OfficeGroupID, false)) ~> Sort1
OfficeSource sort(asc(OfficeGroupID, false)) ~> Sort
Sort,Sort1 join(OfficeSource@OfficeGroupID == OfficeGroupSource@OfficeGroupID,
	joinType:'left',
	broadcast: 'none')~> MergeJoin
MergeJoin select(mapColumn(
		OfficeID = OfficeID,
		OfficeName = OfficeName,
		Hide = Hide,
		TimeStampField = TimeStampField,
		Phone = Phone,
		Address1 = Address1,
		Address2 = Address2,
		Address3 = Address3,
		Address4 = Address4,
		KBA_Phone = KBA_Phone,
		KBA_Address1 = KBA_Address1,
		KBA_Address2 = KBA_Address2,
		KBA_Address3 = KBA_Address3,
		KBA_Address4 = KBA_Address4,
		RFG_Phone = RFG_Phone,
		RFG_Address1 = RFG_Address1,
		RFG_Address2 = RFG_Address2,
		RFG_Address3 = RFG_Address3,
		RFG_Address4 = RFG_Address4,
		RPS_Phone = RPS_Phone,
		NavOfficeCode = NavOfficeCode,
		OfficeGroupID = OfficeGroupSource@OfficeGroupID,
		OfficeGroup = OfficeGroup,
		PartnerID = PartnerID
	),
	 skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	 skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> MergeJoinSelect
MergeJoinSelect derive(OfficeID = OfficeID,
		OfficeName = OfficeName,
		Hide = Hide,
		TimeStampField = TimeStampField,
		Phone = Phone,
		Address1 = Address1,
		Address2 = Address2,
		Address3 = Address3,
		Address4 = Address4,
		KBA_Phone = KBA_Phone,
		KBA_Address1 = KBA_Address1,
		KBA_Address2 = KBA_Address2,
		KBA_Address3 = KBA_Address3,
		KBA_Address4 = KBA_Address4,
		RFG_Phone = RFG_Phone,
		RFG_Address1 = RFG_Address1,
		RFG_Address2 = RFG_Address2,
		RFG_Address3 = RFG_Address3,
		RFG_Address4 = RFG_Address4,
		RPS_Phone = RPS_Phone,
		NavOfficeCode = NavOfficeCode,
		OfficeGroupID = OfficeGroupID,
		OfficeGroup = OfficeGroup,
		PartnerID = PartnerID) ~> MergeJoinREFORMAT1
MergeJoinREFORMAT1 sort(asc(OfficeID, false)) ~> Sort2
Sort2 derive(ETLHashKey = toString('')) ~> DerivedColumn
DerivedColumn sink(input(
		Hide as boolean,
		RPS_Phone as string,
		OfficeID as integer,
		ETLHashKey as string,
		Phone as string,
		Address4 as string,
		KBA_Phone as string,
		RFG_Address1 as string,
		RFG_Address3 as string,
		RFG_Address2 as string,
		RFG_Address4 as string,
		OfficeGroupID as integer,
		Address2 as string,
		Address3 as string,
		PartnerID as integer,
		Address1 as string,
		RFG_Phone as string,
		KBA_Address1 as string,
		KBA_Address2 as string,
		TimeStampField as string,
		NavOfficeCode as string,
		OfficeGroup as string,
		KBA_Address3 as string,
		KBA_Address4 as string,
		OfficeName as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		Hide,
		RPS_Phone,
		OfficeID,
		ETLHashKey,
		Phone,
		Address4,
		KBA_Phone,
		RFG_Address1,
		RFG_Address3,
		RFG_Address2,
		RFG_Address4,
		OfficeGroupID,
		Address2,
		Address3,
		PartnerID,
		Address1,
		RFG_Phone,
		KBA_Address1,
		KBA_Address2,
		TimeStampField,
		NavOfficeCode,
		OfficeGroup,
		KBA_Address3,
		KBA_Address4,
		OfficeName)) ~> OLEDBDestination
